mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, gift_id, address_id, price_diff, order_type, status, deliver_time, rebate_status, create_time FROM gift_delivery_orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, gift_id, address_id, price_diff, order_type, status, deliver_time, rebate_status, create_time FROM gift_delivery_orders WHERE rebate_status = 0 AND order_type = 1
